tagline: The trust layer for agent payments

layers.title: Guard
layers.desc: Preflight spend, identity and URL risk before any payment

layers.title: Attestation
layers.desc: Issue, verify and register agent credentials and mandates

layers.title: Compliance
layers.desc: Ledgers, evidence, disputes and refund arbitration

layers.title: Settlement Ops
layers.desc: Rail routing, MPP sessions, escrow and receipt audit

agents.name: x402 Proxy
agents.summary: All-in-one preflight before any external x402 payment — policy, identity, risk, security grade and optional attestation.
agents.why: Replaces 3–4 separate gate calls in one purchase. Default guard for agent fleets.

agents.name: Pre-x402 Guard
agents.summary: Spend governor + identity gate + risk gate in one lightweight call.
agents.why: Cheapest allow/deny decision for high-frequency payment loops.

agents.name: Agent Verify (ERC-8004)
agents.summary: ERC-8004 TrustScore on Base mainnet — registration, reputation, wallet binding, agent card, domain.
agents.why: On-chain agent identity before high-value x402 spend or fleet onboarding.

agents.name: Pipeline Execute
agents.summary: One-shot orchestration: guard, NL plan, facilitator routing and marketplace pick.
agents.why: Turns a natural-language task and budget into an executed, audited flow.

agents.name: Market Buy-Advisor
agents.summary: Jupiter-style buy quote — ranks paid APIs for an intent with policy and MPP advice.
agents.why: Stops agents overpaying or buying from low-quality marketplace hosts.

agents.name: Seller Audition Coach
agents.summary: Pre-listing QA: audits OpenAPI, discovery manifests and 402 probes.
agents.why: Raises verification score before Dexter/x402gle ingest (target ≥75).

agents.name: Payment-Intent Compiler
agents.summary: Compiles natural-language task + budget into a multi-step x402 execution plan.
agents.why: Deterministic planning layer for autonomous spend within budget.

agents.name: Facilitator Failover
agents.summary: Ranks x402 facilitators and recommends a healthy failover route.
agents.why: Avoids settlement failures when a facilitator degrades.

agents.name: MPP Session Plan
agents.summary: Estimates MPP batch session savings vs per-call settlement.
agents.why: Quantifies when Stripe MPP / Dexter sessions beat individual settlements.

agents.name: MPP Session
agents.summary: MPP session lifecycle: open, voucher, close — batch settlement on Base/Solana.
agents.why: Cuts per-call settlement cost for high-frequency agent workloads.

agents.name: Spend Governor
agents.summary: Enforces per-call and daily USDC spend caps per agent.
agents.why: Hard budget guardrail — the floor of every preflight decision.

agents.name: Identity Gate
agents.summary: Wallet identity tier and risk scoring before paid calls.
agents.why: Blocks low-trust or unfunded wallets from mainnet spend.

agents.name: Risk Gate
agents.summary: Probes URL safety, HTTPS and x402 payment requirements.
agents.why: Detects unreachable, mispriced or unsafe endpoints before payment.

agents.name: API Router
agents.summary: Routes capability queries to the best verified x402 marketplace API.
agents.why: Capability-based routing instead of hard-coded endpoints.

agents.name: Research Brief
agents.summary: Builds a paid-API research pipeline and cost estimate for any topic.
agents.why: Turns a research goal into a concrete, budgeted API plan.

agents.name: Receipt Auditor
agents.summary: Verifies x402 settlement receipts and on-chain transaction alignment.
agents.why: Proof that payment settled for the correct amount on-chain.

agents.name: Attestation Issue
agents.summary: Issues HMAC-signed preflight attestation for partner agent networks.
agents.why: Gate partner interactions on verifiable credential status.

agents.name: Attestation Verify
agents.summary: Verifies attestation signature, expiry and registry lookup.
agents.why: Confirm a partner attestation before trusting their response.

agents.name: Attestation Registry
agents.summary: Query trust registry of valid agent attestations.
agents.why: Fleet controllers reject paid calls without valid X-Suite-Attestation.

agents.name: Refund Arbiter
agents.summary: Evaluates buyer refund eligibility from verification signals.
agents.why: Programmatic refund decisions when an API underdelivers.

agents.name: Settlement Graph
agents.summary: Recommends next paid APIs to call after a settlement receipt.
agents.why: Drives multi-step agent journeys and reduces search steps.

agents.name: Quality Monitor
agents.summary: Regression-probes up to 10 x402 endpoints and returns quality scores.
agents.why: Continuous SLA monitoring of a fleet's API dependencies.

agents.name: Budget Allocator
agents.summary: Allocates shared USDC pool across agent fleet by priority.
agents.why: Fair, priority-weighted budget distribution at fleet scale.

agents.name: Evidence Locker
agents.summary: Exports tamper-evident compliance bundles for x402 settlements.
agents.why: Audit-grade evidence export for finance and security review.

agents.name: Agent Escrow
agents.summary: Create, status or release agent-to-agent USDC escrow records.
agents.why: Conditional payment between agents — release on verified condition.

agents.name: Merchant Trust (KYM)
agents.summary: Know-Your-Merchant trust score with wash-trading and verification signals.
agents.why: Only public KYM oracle — pay / caution / avoid before any merchant payment.

agents.name: Mandate Compile
agents.summary: Compiles AP2-style signed payment mandate from human intent and guardrails.
agents.why: Tamper-resistant intent → execution audit trail for Visa CLI / AP2 fleets.

agents.name: Mandate Verify
agents.summary: Verifies mandate signature and scopes a proposed payment against it.
agents.why: Merchants confirm agent payment is within authorized human intent.

agents.name: Rail Optimizer
agents.summary: Picks best rail: Visa CLI, Stripe MPP, Circle, Base x402 or Solana x402.
agents.why: Unifies card and stablecoin rails in one cost + protection decision.

agents.name: Compliance Ledger
agents.summary: SOC2/tax-ready spend reconciliation with policy flags and tamper hash.
agents.why: CFO-grade audit trail for autonomous agent spend at enterprise scale.

agents.name: Dispute Resolver
agents.summary: Visa chargeback dossier or on-chain refund claim builder.
agents.why: Automates dispute filing for Visa CLI and refund routes for stablecoin rails.

agents.name: Quality Escrow
agents.summary: Quality-gated escrow — release on pass, auto-refund on response mismatch.
agents.why: Closes trust gap on final stablecoin settlements with no chargeback recourse.

agents.name: Semantic Delivery Escrow
agents.summary: Schema + intent rubric escrow with optional LLM judge and auto bond slash.
agents.why: Post-pay delivery guarantee beyond JSON schema — refunds on semantic failure.

agents.name: Mandate Intent Diff
agents.summary: Compare signed mandate scope to MCP tool trace before payment.
agents.why: Blocks prompt-injected routing and out-of-scope merchants before x402 pay.

agents.name: Certified Seller
agents.summary: Certify seller with KYM pass, badge, buyer policy, optional virtual bond.
agents.why: Two-sided trust network — sellers require attested buyers.

agents.name: Certified Buyer Gate
agents.summary: Verify buyer attestation and tier against certified seller policy.
agents.why: Premium APIs only accept attested agents with minimum TrustScore.

agents.name: Pipeline Trust v2
agents.summary: One-shot: mandate diff + KYM ingest + guard + certified buyer gate.
agents.why: Default pre-pay bundle for OpenDexter and fleet agents.

agents.name: Seller Bond Slash
agents.summary: Slash certified seller virtual bond after failed delivery.
agents.why: Economic accountability for certified sellers without on-chain contract yet.
